citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Many devices and services rely on specialized perception algorithms, e.g., license plate readers, zip code readers, face-based phone unlocking, tagging people in Facebook posts, object identification (e.g., Google Lens), or voice-based customer service.
